name: wpank--self-funding-setup
description: Set up a complete self-funding agent lifecycle in one command. Orchestrates 5 agents to take an agent from zero to self-sustaining: provisions wallet, optionally deploys token with V4 pool, configures treasury management, registers identity on ERC-8004, and sets up x402 micropayments. Use when user wants to make their agent self-funding, earn and manage its own revenue, or configure autonomous agent operations end-to-end.
